displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Echoes of Fear #4
synopsis: Jedi Knight Reath Silas and Jedi Padawan Amadeo Azzazzo embark on a desperate mission to recover the Rod of Ages—the last known fragment of an Echo Stone--in time to help contain the greatest threat that has ever faced the Jedi Order: the deadly Force-eaters known as the Nameless. • Series finale!
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Echoes of Fear #4
